meaning: n.螺丝钉,螺旋,螺杆,螺孔,螺旋桨,吝啬鬼vt.调节,旋,加强,压榨,强迫,鼓舞vi.转动,旋,拧
examples: I can't get the screw to turn.
There should be no exposed screw heads.
"Keith Richards' Before They Make Me Run arrives with its screw-you swagger intact, " he added.
"You screw up the fundamentals, you're not supposed to win, " Blue Jays manager John Gibbons said.
